explore.title: Explore Resources
explore.subtitle: Based on your interests and strengths, here are some career resources:
explore.skillCoursesDesc: Find courses and resources to build skills for your desired career path. Learn from top platforms with free and paid options.
explore.expertConnectDesc: Connect with mentors and professionals in your field of interest. Book 1-on-1 sessions for personalized career guidance.

index.heroTitle: Find Your Right Path with SahiRaah
index.heroSubtitle: AI-powered career guidance tailored to your interests and learning style
index.step1Desc: Answer questions about your interests, skills, and learning style.
index.step2Desc: Our AI analyzes your responses to match you with suitable career paths.
index.step3Desc: Get personalized career recommendations and resources to explore them further.
index.testimonial1: SahiRaah helped me discover my passion for digital design when I was considering engineering because everyone else was. Now I'm pursuing a career I truly love.
index.testimonial2: I was stuck between medicine and research. SahiRaah showed me career paths I didn't even know existed, and now I'm studying bioinformatics!
index.ctaDesc: Join thousands of Indian students who found their ideal career with SahiRaah.

about.title: About SahiRaah
about.intro1: In India, many students default to doctor or engineering careers without proper guidance, often leading to career dissatisfaction and poor matches with their natural talents.
about.intro2: SahiRaah helps students discover careers that truly match their interests and strengths.
about.mission1: SahiRaah is on a mission to democratize career guidance for Indian students, helping them discover and pursue pathways aligned with their unique abilities and passions.
about.mission2: We believe that every student deserves personalized guidance that goes beyond traditional expectations, cultural pressures, or limited exposure to career options.
about.step1Desc: Complete a thoughtful questionnaire about your interests, skills, values, and learning preferences.
about.step2Desc: Our AI processes your responses to identify patterns and match them with suitable career paths.
about.step3Desc: Receive personalized career recommendations, resources, and next steps to explore your optimal paths.
